title: HFR-NAdr Available Data (2021-present)
text:
Unified HFR-NAdr current data for the Gulf of Trieste, covering the period 2021-present. Each file has a regularized 30-minute time axis and CF-1.8-style attributes. Radial datasets are on each station’s native range/bearing grid; the Total dataset is on a regular lat/lon grid.



File
Description
Size
Download




hfr_nadr_total_2021_present_unified.nc
Total surface currents (all stations combined)
311.3 MB
Download


hfr_nadr_auri_2021_present_unified.nc
Radial currents — AURI station (Aurisina, IT)
370.9 MB
Download


hfr_nadr_izol_2021_present_unified.nc
Radial currents — IZOL station (Izola, SI)
45.5 MB
Download


hfr_nadr_pira_2021_present_unified.nc
Radial currents — PIRA station (Piran, SI)
332.6 MB
Download


hfr_nadr_tri1_2021_present_unified.nc
Radial currents — TRI1 station (Trieste, IT)
190.1 MB
Download



Source: EU HFR Node ERDDAP. To reproduce or extend this dataset yourself, see src/ and scripts/ in this repository (requires the environment in environment.yml).

title: HF Radar Network — Gulf of Trieste
text:
Station map of the HFR-NAdr high-frequency radar network (AURI, TRI1, IZOL, PIRA). Hover over a station to see its details.
      
See the Data page for downloadable current data.
WP1 system inventory report: forthcoming (pending final corrections).
